title: Claddagh
description: Celebrate St Patrick’s Day with those dear to your heart and gift them their very own Claddagh soap, infused with herbaceous pine and fir.
ingredients: Oryza Sativa Bran Oil (Rice Bran Oil)
Styrax Tonkinensis Resin Extract (Benzoin Resinoid Extract)
Cocos Nucifera Oil (Organic Extra Virgin Coconut Oil)

images.alt: Claddagh. A St. Patrick's Day-themed soap shaped like the traditional Irish Claddagh. The soap is a golden-caramel colour with golden lustre throughout and shaped like two hands reaching in to hold a red heart with a crown on top.
The image shows the model's hand reaching under running tap water above white porcelain. Their hand is holding the traditional Claddagh-shaped soap as droplets splash off the product.
The image shows the model's hands holding the traditional Claddagh-shaped soap after lathering it up with water in their palm, creating a delicate, golden, soapy lather over their skin.
The image shows the model's hands holding the traditional Claddagh-shaped soap after lathering it up with water in their palm, creating a delicate, golden, soapy lather over their skin.
The model's hands are holding the glittering, golden, traditional Irish Claddagh hands, heart and crown shaped soap in their palms after using the product to create a delicate lather over their skin.
